{{Quote|Death to tyrants! Death to the Satab! Torture me as you will, but I'll never renounce my beliefs!|Phalaf|<ref name="Annual" />}}
'''Phalaf''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Unidentified Ventooine species|non-Human]] peasant who, along with the [[Rov]] [[Vetter Piin]], violently opposed the [[Satab (individual)|Satab]] monarch's rule over [[Ventooine/Legends|Ventooine]] during the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Period]]. Known for his driving hatred of the upper class, Phalaf attempted to [[Assassin/Legends|assassinate]] [[Chrysalla]], the [[Satab]]'s favored ward and lover, by throwing a bomb off a rooftop into her carriage—he was foiled by offworlder [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], and taken into custody by the Satab's guard. Phalaf was brought before the Satab at his palace, but rather than be [[Torture/Legends|tortured]] as he expected, the Satab instead used the powers granted to him by the [[Shadeshine]] mineral to send Phalaf's metabolism into overdrive with a mere touch, causing [[Death/Legends|death]] by old age in a man of only around 18 years.<ref name="Annual" />
